devdoc.details: Receives a token's remaining supply and raised DOGE from BondingCurve once it hits its target, and turns that into a permanently locked DEX position: it adds the liquidity, burns the LP tokens to a dead address (the simplest, most trustless form of "Liquidity Locked" - nobody, not even DogeFood Lab, can ever be the one who pulls it), and flips on the token's post-graduation swap fee against the new pair. The DEX router address is NOT hardcoded - DogeOS's router/factory addresses should be set via setRouter() once known. graduate() reverts until that's configured, so a missing router blocks graduation loudly instead of silently sending funds somewhere wrong.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

graduate(address,uint256,address).details: Called once by BondingCurve when a curve's graduation target is reached. Expects tokenAmount of `token` to already have been transferred here, and the DOGE amount to arrive as msg.value.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setRouter(address).details: Must be called with DogeOS's live DEX router address before the first token can graduate.

sweep(address,address,uint256).details: Recovers rounding dust left behind after addLiquidityETH (it can use slightly less than the full amounts offered). Does not touch tokens/DOGE mid-graduation since graduate() is a single atomic call.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

liquiditySlippageBps.details: Basis points of slippage tolerance allowed when seeding the pool (e.g. 300 = 3%). Applies to both the token and DOGE side.

devdoc.title: GraduationManager
